heroSubtitle: Step-by-step video guides for using inhalers and nebulizers correctly. Proper technique helps your medication work as intended.
introBody: Most inhaler medications fail to reach the lungs because of incorrect technique. The short videos below walk you through each device. If you have questions or want a one-on-one teaching session, please contact your CCPSA care team.

videos.title: Metered Dose Inhaler with a Spacer
videos.description: How to use a metered dose inhaler (MDI) with a spacer or valved holding chamber.

videos.title: Flexhaler
videos.description: How to use a Flexhaler dry powder inhaler (e.g., Pulmicort).

videos.title: Aerolizer
videos.description: How to use an Aerolizer single-dose dry powder inhaler.

videos.title: Twisthaler
videos.description: How to use a Twisthaler dry powder inhaler (e.g., Asmanex).

videos.title: Nebulizer
videos.description: How to properly set up and use a nebulizer for at-home breathing treatments.

videos.title: Diskus
videos.description: How to use a Diskus dry powder inhaler (e.g., Advair, Flovent).

ctaBody: If you're unsure your technique is correct, our clinical staff can review it with you at your next visit. Call us to schedule.
